title: Add tool descriptions + parameter schemas to LLM system prompt
description:
## Problem
The LLM prompt only listed tool names: `"Available bot tools: MoveTo, GetStatus, ..."`. The LLM had no idea what parameters each tool takes, so it couldn't use tools like `QueryEntities(radius, typeFilter)` effectively.

## Fix
Changed `LlmChatInterpreter` to accept `IReadOnlyList<ITool>` (not just names). Added `FormatToolList` and `ExtractToolParams` helpers that programmatically build tool descriptions from `ITool.Description` and `ITool.InputSchema`:

```
Available tools (use these names in plan actions):
  MoveTo(x, y, z) — Navigate to coordinates
  GetStatus — Request current bot status
  QueryEntities(radius, typeFilter?) — Query entities within radius
  PlaceBlock(x, y, z, material, block?, count?) — Place a block at coordinates
  ...
```

Required params listed first, optional marked with `?`. Adding a new tool automatically includes its description.

## Files
- `Agent.Planning/LlmChatInterpreter.cs` — FormatToolList, ExtractToolParams helpers
- `WebUI.Blazor/Program.cs` — pass ToolDispatcher.All instead of RegisteredNames

## Validation
- `dotnet build` — 0 warnings
- `dotnet test` — 746/746 passed
